data.intent: Create a privacy-preserving local LLM writing-style skill for named reusable profiles, example intake, neutral calibration, eval scaffolding, and profile inheritance.
Create the portable writing-style skill scaffold, baseline SKILL.md shell, artifact templates, conservative config defaults, and metadata alignment.

data.summary: Created skill/writing-style scaffold directories for templates, prompts, scripts, and eval cases.
Added valid writing-style SKILL.md scaffold with trigger description and placeholder guidance.
Added profile.md template with required front matter and profile body headings.
Added conservative config.json template for sanitization, neutral prompts, readiness, and naming defaults.
Added calibration-session.md template with source summary, sanitization, hypothesis, rounds, and pending decisions sections.
Added eval-case.md template with eval front matter and rubric sections.
Updated project metadata description and ignored generated Cicadas context.md.
Verified JSON template, skill validation, and empty dependency list; no database, framework, remote persistence, or runtime dependency was introduced.
Completed scaffold, skill shell, profile/config/session/eval templates, metadata update, and validation checks.
data.canon_entry: No canon update on feature branch.
data.notes_for_evaluator: Validated config JSON, validated skill front matter, and confirmed dependencies remain empty.

data.summary: Builder confirmed scaffold feature PR merge; applied local merge into initiative/writing-skill.

data.intent: Implement the complete writing-style skill workflow for profile creation, sanitization, calibration, saving, forking, invocation, settings changes, neutral prompts, and feedback rubric.

data.summary: Filled SKILL.md trigger rules and use guidance for profile creation, updating, forking, invocation, and settings.
Implemented create-profile instructions for naming, style-only explanation, example intake, sparse examples, and hypothesis review.
Implemented sanitization and privacy rules for treating examples as data, excluding source facts, and confirming retained terms.
Implemented calibration flow with neutral prompts, freeform feedback, optional scoring, summaries, and ready/experimental paths.
Implemented profile-save flow with preview, local Markdown profile writing, status, invocation examples, and change notes.
Implemented profile-fork flow with source loading, style diffing, comparison samples, and source mutation protection.
Implemented saved-profile invocation flow that separates style from task content and asks for missing facts.
Implemented settings-change flow with current/proposed values, privacy-risk confirmation, and unknown-key preservation.
Added neutral calibration prompts for email, text, report, narrative, and general-purpose categories.
Added feedback rubric covering style match, privacy leakage, instruction adherence, readiness, and human review.
Dry-run reviewed create, fork, invoke, settings, and privacy-confirmation paths for ambiguity and completeness.
Completed full writing-style workflow instructions, neutral calibration prompts, feedback rubric, dry-run review, and task reflection.
data.canon_entry: No canon update on feature branch.
data.notes_for_evaluator: Skill validation passed; checked create, fork, invoke, settings, privacy confirmation, prompt categories, and rubric coverage.

data.summary: Builder approved workflow feature boundary; applied local merge into initiative/writing-skill.
